knowledge.content: Project location: Sector 45, Whitefield, Bangalore. 2km from ITPL, 15 mins from Whitefield Metro Station. Google Maps: bit.ly/project-location
Site visits available Monday-Sunday, 9 AM to 6 PM. Guided tours every hour. Average visit duration: 45 minutes. Book 24 hours in advance.
Available slots: 9 AM, 10 AM, 11 AM, 12 PM, 2 PM, 3 PM, 4 PM, 5 PM. Weekends get booked fast, recommend weekday visits.
Site visit coordinator: Rajesh Kumar, Phone: +91-9876543210. For directions or queries, call between 9 AM - 6 PM.
From Whitefield Metro: Take bus 500D or auto (₹80). By car: Take Old Madras Road, turn at ITPL signal. Free parking available at site.
